title: tagetes mulleri
intro: Tagetes mulleri, also known as Mexican marigold, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene compounds such as tagetone and tagetenone. The health benefits of Tagetes mulleri include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
